member.name: T:SmartMicrobus.API.Controllers.CustomControllerBase
member.summary: Base controller for the Smart Microbus API, providing common functionality for all controllers.

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Controllers.CustomControllerBase.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor for CustomControllerBase, initializing the unit of work.

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Controllers.CustomControllerBase.ToActionResult(SmartMicrobus.Core.DTO.Common.ApiResponse)
member.summary: Converts an ApiResponse object to an appropriate IActionResult based on its success status and HTTP status code.
member.remarks: This method maps common HTTP status codes (400, 404, 401) to their respective IActionResult types. For other status codes, a generic 500 Internal Server Error is returned.
member.param: The ApiResponse to convert. Determines the result type and status code of the returned IActionResult.
member.returns: An IActionResult representing the outcome described by the ApiResponse. Returns Ok if successful; otherwise, returns a result corresponding to the ApiResponse's status code.

member.name: T:SmartMicrobus.API.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Exception Handling Middleware Extensions

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddlewareExtensions.UseExceptionHandlingMiddleware(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Use Exception Handling Middleware

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Realtime.SignalRRouteTrackingNotificationService.NotifyRouteUpdated(System.Guid)
member.summary: Called on check-in/check-out events — re-queries counts and includes the best known ETA from the in-memory tracker.

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Realtime.SignalRRouteTrackingNotificationService.UpdateDriverEtaAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called from LocationTrackingService on every GPS update. Tracks the ETA per driver and broadcasts the minimum across all active drivers.

member.name: M:SmartMicrobus.API.Realtime.SignalRRouteTrackingNotificationService.RemoveDriverEta(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a driver's ETA entry when their trip ends.

member.name: T:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.ConcurrencyFailure
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The record you attempted to edit was modified by another user..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.DefaultError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An unknown failure has occurred..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.DuplicateEmail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Email '{0}' is already taken..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.DuplicateRoleName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Role name '{0}' already exists..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.DuplicateUserName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The number '{0}' already exists..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.Forbidden
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Access denied..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.InternalServerError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Something went wrong. Please try again later..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.InvalidEmail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Email '{0}' is invalid..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.InvalidRoleName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Role name '{0}' is invalid..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.InvalidToken
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid token..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.InvalidUserName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The number '{0}' is invalid..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.LoginAlreadyAssociated
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This login is already associated with another account..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordMismatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Incorrect password..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordRequiresDigit
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must contain at least one digit..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordRequiresLower
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must contain a lowercase letter..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must contain a non-alphanumeric character..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must contain at least {0} unique characters..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordRequiresUpper
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must contain an uppercase letter..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.PasswordTooShort
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Password must be at least {0} characters..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.StationNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Station not found..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.TooManyRequests
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too Many Requests. Please try again later..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.Unauthorized
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unauthorized access..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.UserAlreadyHasPassword
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User already has a password..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.UserAlreadyInRole
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User is already in role '{0}'..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.UserLockoutNotEnabled
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lockout is not enabled for this user..

member.name: P:SmartMicrobus.API.Resources.SharedResource.UserNotInRole
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User is not in role '{0}'..
